Executive Briefing 27 Mar 2026
▦ Badge Guide expand for an overview of what article badges mean ▶
Article Status
New First seen this week
Carried over from prior week
Faded row = older than 30 days
Regulatory Urgency
High Deadline <90 days or active enforcement
Medium Proposed rule or 90–365 days out
Low Long-range or informational
Company Relevance
(no badge)  Direct impact on our products/supply chain
Indirect Worth knowing — signals trends for us (hover for why)
Monitor General news — no foreseeable company impact
Impact Score (1–10)
7+ High company impact
4–6 Moderate company impact
1–3 Low company impact
Score weights: product risk (35%), supply chain (25%), financial (20%), timeline (20%)
